---
title: "How mRNA Vaccines Were Made Possible: Kariko's Perseverance"
description: "The story of how mRNA vaccines were made possible by one scientist's (Katalin Karikó) perseverance."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-12-26"
categories: [biomedical, science, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![mRNA vaccines and Kariko. Image from [Wired UK](https://www.wired.co.uk/article/mrna-coronavirus-vaccine-pfizer-biontech).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

The story of how mRNA vaccines are made possible by one scientist's (Katalin Karikó) perseverance.

Article: <https://www.wired.co.uk/article/mrna-coronavirus-vaccine-pfizer-biontech>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_mrna-vaccines-activity-6748826254444785664-E8ju).*
